title: SSRS report (TempDB table + Contract + DP + Controller + AxReport)
instruction: In the sandbox model, build a simple SSRS report named DemoNoteReport over the ConDemoNoteHeader table. Create: (1) a TempDB table DemoNoteReportTmp (TableType=TempDB) with fields NoteId and Subject matching ConDemoNoteHeader; (2) an empty DataContract class DemoNoteReportContract ([DataContractAttribute], no filter params needed); (3) a Data Provider class DemoNoteReportDP extending SRSReportDataProviderBase, decorated [SRSReportParameterAttribute(classStr(DemoNoteReportContract))], with a [SRSReportDataSetAttribute] getter for the tmp table and a processReport() that populates it via insert_recordset from ConDemoNoteHeader (declare a local table variable before using it in the select -- the bare table name is not a valid select source); (4) a Controller class DemoNoteReportController extending SrsReportRunController with a static main(Args) entry point; (5) an AxReport named DemoNoteReport with a ReportDataProvider dataset over the DP class and a design named 'Design'. Use get_knowledge(topic="ssrs report") to ground the pattern. All five objects must build clean.
